priority_tagged_entities_rev8_delta.note: Some entities carry multiple PIR tags. The rev8 delta is balanced across all three PIR axes: PIR-07 ENRICHMENT (DAP/Loke under-pressure rencana + Anwar FELDA positive) + PIR-06 OPERATIONAL-SPLIT REINFORCEMENT (Kosmo 'keluar daripada konsensus PN negeri') + PIR-09 newly-named figure (Datuk Alzafny Ahmad). 4 of 4 new entities are PIR-priority-tagged. The 1 revised carryover (Aminuddin) is PIR-07. The Kosmo 'consensus-exit + split-vote' framing is the cycle's strongest new datum — PIR-06 reinforcement, NOT a new escalation.

trends.overall_rev8: PH-FAVORABLE TILT HOLDS; PIR-06 CRITICAL FLAG CARRIED (operational-split reinforcement, not new escalation). The 011915 cycle is the FIRST Day-2 morning cycle (+2h15m since 231029). The dominant development is a Day-2 morning ENRICHMENT across all three PIR axes: (1) PIR-07 — the FIRST mainstream rencana to explicitly frame NS PRN as a DAP/Loke LEADERSHIP REFERENDUM (Utusan rencana 'PRN NS penentu hala tuju DAP', opinion by a 25-year former journalist, 09:18 MYT) introduces THREE new sub-threads (adat-controversy seat-move-link, Loke fund-channeling dispute, Melaka PH-BN fracture) and revises Aminuddin 0.62→0.61 (-1.64%, adat counter-signal); Anwar/Madani campaign-adjacent positive (Utusan 'Felda martabat peneroka - Anwar', 08:28 MYT) on FELDA settler uplift + new chairman Ahmad Badri (0.65); (2) PIR-06 — Kosmo news recap 'Percaturan BN-PH-Bersatu' (09:05 MYT, full text) provides the STRONGEST OPERATIONAL-SPLIT CONFIRMATION TO DATE with explicit Malay 'keluar daripada konsensus PN negeri' + 'memecah undi di kawasan-kawasan kritikal' framing — reinforces (does NOT escalate) the PIR-06 empirical ballot-level schism tier (Bersatu 0.74 / ESC-011 0.80 / ESC-014 0.82 all UNCHANGED); (3) PIR-09 — entities_233104 (rev-8 extraction, 297 total entities) names Datuk Alzafny Ahmad (NS police chief, Tamim-surrender context, NEW neutral 0.50) + Wee Ka Siong/Tamim Dahri Abd Razak full names; no new credibility EVENT. NO formal PN-MT removal notice and NO formal Bersatu withdrawal notice — formal_removal_notice_detected=false across now 6 consecutive passes since 170837 (182751/194028/205755/220325/231029/011915). No entity exceeds the 30% numeric shift threshold (largest: Aminuddin -1.64%). No direction flips. NO NEW critical qualitative shift — the PIR-06 CRITICAL flag carries forward from rev5 (escalation was rev4→rev5; rev5→rev6 consolidation; rev6→rev7 corroboration/enrichment; rev7→rev8 operational-split reinforcement). Trigger #2 unchanged (reachable via EITHER path, not fired). No Bersatu candidate withdrawals reported this cycle. entities_233104 (rev-8 extraction, 297 total entities) RESOLVES the rev7 entity-layer gap.
trends.pir06_trend: OPERATIONAL-SPLIT REINFORCED at the consolidated tier (no new escalation). Progression: 15:09 'could face termination' → 16:33 'info chief floats termination' → 19:19 'has grounds to remove' (Kiandee, NST) → 22:20 SENIOR-FIGURE PUBLIC ADVOCACY (Kiandee full Utusan body, 'asas kukuh') [rev4] → 01:08 MYT 19 Jul PRINCIPAL-LEVEL EXIT SIGNALING (Muhyiddin 'Goodbye PN?'; Annuar Musa 'part ways'; PAS 'rift widens'; Hadi 'blames Bersatu'; mainstream 'imminent?') [rev5] → 05:04 MYT 19 Jul CONSOLIDATION (KINIGUIDE 'shifting alliances' master-narrative; Muhyiddin 'sole true opposition' + 'new bloc after NS polls'; BN-PN scope-expansion Melaka/PRU16; Muhyiddin graft-trial surfacing) [rev6] → 07:10 MYT 19 Jul CORROBORATION/ENRICHMENT (NST 'Bersatu at a crossroads' analytical frame; empirical 7 Bersatu-vs-PN ballot clashes + own-logo 24 seats; 5-hot-seats battleground mapping) [rev7] → 09:19 MYT 19 Jul OPERATIONAL-SPLIT REINFORCEMENT (Kosmo 'keluar daripada konsensus PN negeri' + 'memecah undi di kawasan-kawasan kritikal' — strongest operational-split confirmation to date; Bersatu 0.74 UNCHANGED, reinforced at the empirical-split tier; NO new principal statement; NO formal notice) [rev8]. THREE-SIDED fracture unchanged and now operationally reinforced at the strongest-confirmation tier. NO formal notice of either type across 6 consecutive passes since 170837. Trajectory UNCHANGED: most likely Bersatu voluntary realignment AFTER Aug 1 poll; PN-MT removal remains possible. Trigger #2 unchanged (reachable via EITHER path, not fired).
trends.pir09_trend: ENRICHED with ONE newly-named figure (Datuk Alzafny Ahmad, NS police chief — Tamim surrender context, neutral 0.50) per entities_233104 rev-8 extraction. NO new PIR-09 credibility EVENT in the 011915 cycle (collection_metadata: 'No new Bersatu-candidate bankruptcy/court-eligibility findings this cycle'). UNCHANGED carryover: Tamim Dahri (mkini rotation re-surface, content-equivalent) + Gerakan pecat Tang Jay Son + MCA silencing Saw Yee Fung + Albert Tei 'barking dogs' + Bujang Abu withdrawal + Wee 'BN-PN not a merger' management + 'Pemimpin MCA persoal' rank-and-file questioning + Machang Bersatu calls for Wan Ahmad Fayhsal to be sacked (NEW mention this cycle, Bersatu internal disciplinary, PIR-09-adjacent). N.14 Ampangan Day-1 messaging war continues (Utusan 'Kempen berkesan mampu bantu PH pertahankan Ampangan' — PH defending Rafie as 'experienced rep'). The disciplinary pattern (Geranan pecat + MCA silencing + Kiandee/Bersatu signal + Tamim legal + Machang Bersatu internal) continues to bridge to PIR-06.
trends.pir07_trend: Day-2 morning ENRICHMENT. The FIRST mainstream rencana to explicitly frame NS PRN as a DAP/Loke LEADERSHIP REFERENDUM (Utusan rencana 'PRN NS penentu hala tuju DAP', 09:18 MYT, full text, opinion by a 25-year former journalist) — DAP 'paling tertekan' + Loke's leadership test (DAP won all 11 NS seats in PRU-14 and PRN 2023) + THREE new sub-threads: (1) adat-controversy seat-move-link to Aminuddin's Sikamat→Linggi move; (2) Loke fund-channeling dispute (Balai Undang Luak Sungai Ujong; Loke denies); (3) Melaka PH-BN fracture (4 DAP+1 Amanah ADUN withdrew support from BN state gov). Kosmo recap (09:05 MYT, full text) reconfirms Aminuddin's Linggi 3-cornered 'keputusan berani' (brave decision) + the full 103-candidate roster + 3-coalition strategy. Anwar/Madani campaign-adjacent positive (Utusan 'Felda martabat peneroka - Anwar', 08:28 MYT, full text, 0.65). Aminuddin revised 0.62→0.61 (-1.64%) on the adat-controversy counter-signal (still positive, well below 30% threshold). The 5 hot seats (Linggi/Sikamat/Ampangan/Paroi/Labu) and 7 Bersatu-vs-PN clash seats (Sikamat/Ampangan/Paroi/Labu + 3 pending) hold from rev7. No new Day-2 campaign EVENTS (walkabouts, ops-centre openings) or poll/forecast publications captured this cycle. 25 of 36 seats multi-cornered (69%); exact structure 11/21/2/2; 2 five-cornered (N.10 Nilai, N.33 Sri Tanjung) — trigger #7 WATCH. BN manifesto launch 24 Jul (DUN Linggi).

TWO NEW negative entities this cycle: DAP/Loke under-pressure referendum 0.42 (PIR-07, Utusan rencana opinion — Day-2 morning DAP-leadership thread) + Bersatu 'keluar daripada konsensus PN negeri' + 'memecah undi' 0.42 (PIR-06+07, Kosmo recap — strongest operational-split confirmation). All maximally favourable to PH.
trends.positive_sentiment_trend: ONE new positive entity + one revised (down) carryover: Anwar/Madani FELDA settler uplift campaign-adjacent 0.65 (PIR-07, NEW — Utusan 'Felda martabat peneroka - Anwar', full text, news report) + Aminuddin 0.62→0.61 (-1.64%, REVISED DOWN on the adat-controversy counter-signal in Utusan rencana; Kosmo 'keputusan berani' positive holds; well below 30% threshold; still positive direction). Carryover PH-favorable positives: Azizul 0.53, Jalaluddin 0.55, SPR-confirmed configuration 0.62. PH-favorable structural tilt HOLDS via the consolidated + now operationally-reinforced opposition fracture (PIR-06 two-sided motion + 7 Bersatu-vs-PN ballot clashes + Kosmo 'consensus-exit + split-vote'). The DAP/Loke under-pressure rencana is a NEW Day-2 negative sub-trend for the PH component party — watch whether it hardens into broader narrative.
trends.neutral_sentiment_trend: ONE new neutral entity this cycle: Datuk Alzafny Ahmad (NS police chief — newly-named figure in entities_233104 rev-8 extraction, Tamim surrender context, 0.50, PIR-09). Carryover neutrals from rev7: 5-hot-seats battleground map 0.52, 7 Bersatu-vs-PN ballot clashes / 3-coalition strategy 0.56, NST 'Bersatu at a crossroads' 0.54 (headline only, reduced confidence — NST wpapi 404, full body STILL DEFERRED), KINIGUIDE 0.55, Wee 0.48, Anwar-DAP 0.50, BN-majoriti 0.52, BN-PN-Melaka 0.52, mainstream 'imminent?' 0.55, BN-PN understanding operational 0.55, DAP anti-BN 0.50, Samsuri 0.52, N.14 Ampangan 0.50, Nazri 0.48, MB-candidate deferred 0.50, Fuziah 0.52, Bujang Abu 0.45.

PIR-06.priority: CRITICAL (carried — operational-split REINFORCEMENT, not new escalation)
PIR-06.directive: Sentiment around PN-Bersatu relationship (removal, expulsion, withdrawal narratives)
PIR-06.critical_flag_status: ACTIVE / CARRIED from rev5 (via rev6, rev7). The rev7→rev8 transition is OPERATIONAL-SPLIT REINFORCEMENT, not a new critical shift. The two-sided/three-sided principal-level motion holds at the rev6 consolidated tier; the 011915 Day-2 morning content reinforces it (Kosmo 'keluar daripada konsensus PN negeri' + 'memecah undi' — strongest operational-split confirmation to date) without crossing into formal notice.
PIR-06.assessment: OPERATIONAL-SPLIT REINFORCED at the consolidated tier (no new escalation). The 011915 Day-2 morning cycle (FIRST Day-2 morning cycle, +2h15m since 231029) adds the STRONGEST OPERATIONAL-SPLIT CONFIRMATION TO DATE: Kosmo news recap 'Percaturan BN-PH-Bersatu' (09:05 MYT 19 Jul, full text) explicitly states Bersatu 'KELUAR DARIPADA KONSENSUS PN NEGERI' + 'MEMECAH UNDI DI KAWASAN-KAWASAN KRITIKAL' — the most pointed Malay-language characterization of Bersatu's NS move as a consensus-exit and vote-split, going beyond the rev7 Utusan 'Tiga gabungan bertembung' empirical-clash confirmation. Per collection_metadata cycle_delta_vs_prior_231029: 'strongest operational-split confirmation to date'. This REINFORCES (does NOT escalate) the existing PIR-06 assessment (Bersatu 0.74, ESC-011 0.80, ESC-014 0.82) — no formal notice, no new principal statement, no candidate withdrawal. NO formal PN Supreme Council (Majlis Tertinggi) removal notice and NO formal Bersatu withdrawal notice — formal_removal_notice_detected=false across now 6 consecutive passes since 170837 (182751/194028/205755/220325/231029/011915). The 3 carryover precursor signals (Kiandee 'asas kukuh'/'grounds to remove' + 'PAS may leave or be expelled' analysts + Machang Bersatu calls for Wan Ahmad Fayhsal to be sacked) remain at the precursor/analytical level — no new formal notice. No Bersatu candidate withdrawals reported in the Tier-4 seats (collection_metadata tier4_seat_watch: 'no candidate withdrawals reported this cycle'). Trajectory per collection_metadata UNCHANGED — most likely near-term outcome Bersatu voluntary realignment/exiting AFTER the Aug 1 poll; a reactive PN-MT removal notice remains possible if Bersatu candidates actively damage PN partners in the 7 confirmed direct-clash seats. Maximally favourable to PH.

The dominant new development is the FIRST mainstream rencana to explicitly frame NS PRN as a DAP/Loke LEADERSHIP REFERENDUM: Utusan rencana 'PRN Negeri Sembilan penentu hala tuju DAP' (09:18 MYT 19 Jul, full text, opinion by a 25-year former journalist) — DAP 'paling tertekan berbanding beberapa pilihan raya lalu' (most pressured compared to several past elections); Loke's leadership test; DAP won all 11 NS seats in PRU-14 and PRN 2023; THREE new sub-threads: (1) ADAT INSTITUTION CONTROVERSY LINK to Aminuddin's Sikamat→Linggi move; (2) LOKE FUND-CHANNELING DISPUTE (Balai Undang Luak Sungai Ujong; Loke denies); (3) MELAKA PH-BN FRACTURE (4 DAP+1 Amanah ADUN withdrew support from BN state gov → Melaka BN-PH gone). Kosmo recap (09:05 MYT, full text) reconfirms Aminuddin's Linggi 3-cornered 'keputusan berani' (brave decision) vs Faizal Ramli/BN-incumbent + Zamri Md Said/Bersatu + the full 103-candidate roster + 3-coalition strategy. Utusan 'Felda martabat peneroka - Anwar' (08:28 MYT, full text) — Anwar/Madani campaign-adjacent positive (0.65) on FELDA settler uplift + new chairman Ahmad Badri Mohd. Zahir. The 5 hot seats (Linggi/Sikamat/Ampangan/Paroi/Labu) and 7 Bersatu-vs-PN clash seats (Sikamat/Ampangan/Paroi/Labu + 3 pending) hold from rev7. No new Day-2 campaign EVENTS (walkabouts, ops-centre openings) or poll/forecast publications captured this cycle — collection_metadata: 'Ops-centre openings / candidate walkabouts not yet reported in detail (Day-1 morning)'. 25 of 36 seats multi-cornered (69%); exact structure 11/21/2/2; 2 five-cornered (N.10 Nilai, N.33 Sri Tanjung) — trigger #7 WATCH. BN manifesto launch 24 Jul (DUN Linggi).
